description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The front features a driveway with a parked car, a garage, and a small landscaped yard with trees and shrubs. Large windows line both floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating, a small pool, and additional landscaping, creating a comfortable outdoor living area. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with subtle accents and a minimalist approach. The property is surrounded by a paved walkway and several mature trees, enhancing its suburban appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard deck with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard deck and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, outdoor seating, pool, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard deck, pool, and the side of the house with additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small porch, overhang, and flanked by columns and landscaping
